name: 周兴江实验室
description: Pioneering ARPES group at IOP-CAS led by Prof. Zhou Xingjiang. Operates multiple laser-based and synchrotron ARPES systems including vacuum ultraviolet laser ARPES.

name: Zhi-Xun Shen Laboratory
description: Stanford Institute for Materials and Energy Sciences (SIMES) ARPES group. Pioneered many ARPES techniques; discovered key electronic structure features in cuprates, topological insulators, and quantum materials.

name: 丁洪实验室
description: ARPES group at IOP-CAS led by Prof. Ding Hong. Major contributions to iron-based superconductor electronic structure and topological quantum materials research.

name: 封东来实验室
description: ARPES group at Fudan University led by Prof. Feng Donglai. Expertise in laser-based spin-resolved ARPES; studies on unconventional superconductors and strongly correlated materials.

name: 张首晟实验室
description: Theoretical group with strong experimental ARPES collaboration. Foundational work on topological insulators and quantum anomalous Hall effect, guiding ARPES experimental programs worldwide.
keywords: Theory;Topological Insulators;Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect;ARPES Theory;Topological Quantum Materials

name: Takahashi Laboratory
description: ARPES group at ISSP, University of Tokyo. Operates multiple ARPES systems including ultrahigh-resolution laser ARPES. Leading studies on novel superconductors, topological materials, and strongly correlated electron systems.

name: 钱嘉陵实验室
description: ARPES group at Zhejiang University studying quantum materials including topological semimetals, kagome metals, and unconventional superconductors using synchrotron-based and lab-based ARPES.

name: 陈仙辉实验室
description: Research group at USTC focused on the discovery and ARPES characterization of novel superconductors including iron-based and nickel-based superconductors.

name: Comin Laboratory
description: MIT group led by Prof. Riccardo Comin. Advanced ARPES and resonant soft X-ray scattering on quantum materials including charge density wave systems, 2D materials, and topological matter.
keywords: ARPES;Resonant Soft X-ray Scattering;Charge Density Waves;2D Materials;Topological Matter

name: Lanzara Laboratory
description: UC Berkeley and LBNL group led by Prof. Alessandra Lanzara. Pioneering time-resolved ARPES (trARPES) studies of ultrafast dynamics in quantum materials.

name: Kim Laboratory
description: POSTECH ARPES group at Pohang Accelerator Laboratory. Utilizes synchrotron ARPES beamlines for studies on topological materials, 2D van der Waals materials, and strongly correlated oxides.
keywords: ARPES;Synchrotron ARPES;Topological Materials;2D Materials;Van der Waals Heterostructures;Strongly Correlated Oxides

name: King Laboratory
description: University of St Andrews group focusing on electronic structure of quantum materials using ARPES. Studies include kagome metals, topological semimetals, and transition metal dichalcogenides.
keywords: ARPES;Kagome Metals;Topological Semimetals;Transition Metal Dichalcogenides;Quantum Materials

name: Valla Laboratory
description: Brookhaven National Laboratory ARPES group. Ultrahigh-resolution ARPES at NSLS-II beamlines; studies on charge density waves, pseudogap phase of cuprates, and topological quantum materials.

name: Shi Ming Laboratory
description: PSI Swiss Light Source ARPES group. Operates advanced ARPES endstations at SLS; spin-resolved ARPES and micro-ARPES on quantum materials including topological matter and correlated oxides.

name: 贾金锋实验室
description: Shanghai Jiao Tong University and Tsung-Dao Lee Institute ARPES group. MBE-ARPES combined system for in-situ electronic structure studies; topological superconductivity and Majorana physics.

name: Damascelli Laboratory
description: Quantum Matter Institute at UBC. World-leading ARPES group studying cuprate superconductors, topological materials, and strongly correlated electron systems with synchrotron-based spectroscopy.
keywords: ARPES;Cuprate Superconductors;Topological Materials;Strongly Correlated Systems;Synchrotron Spectroscopy

name: Baumberger Laboratory
description: EPFL group studying 2D materials and van der Waals heterostructures using advanced ARPES techniques. Focus on electronic structure of atomically thin materials.
keywords: ARPES;2D Materials;Van der Waals Heterostructures;Electronic Structure;Strongly Correlated Materials

name: Claessen Group
description: University of Wuerzburg EP4 group. ARPES studies of correlated electron systems, topological insulators, and oxide interfaces including 2D electron systems.
keywords: ARPES;Correlated Electron Systems;Topological Insulators;Oxide Interfaces;2D Electron Systems

name: Borisenko Group
description: IFW Dresden group studying iron-based superconductors, topological materials, and strongly correlated systems. Major contributions to electronic structure of unconventional superconductors.
keywords: ARPES;Iron-Based Superconductors;Electronic Structure;Strongly Correlated Systems;Topological Materials

name: ALS ARPES Group
description: Advanced Light Source at LBNL. Multiple ARPES endstations (MERLIN, MAESTRO) serving the international condensed matter physics community. Denlinger group.
keywords: Synchrotron ARPES;Soft X-ray ARPES;Heavy Fermions;Topological Materials;Strongly Correlated Systems

name: SSRL ARPES Group
description: Stanford Synchrotron Radiation Lightsource ARPES program. Beamlines 5-4 and 10.0.1 dedicated to angle-resolved photoemission. Lu Donghui group.

name: Shin-Kondo Laboratory
description: ISSP University of Tokyo orbital spectroscopy group. Ultrahigh-resolution laser ARPES; studies on strongly correlated systems, high-Tc superconductors and topological materials.
keywords: Laser ARPES;Ultrahigh-resolution;Strongly Correlated Systems;High-Tc Superconductors;Topological Materials

name: Kim Seoul ARPES Lab
description: Seoul National University ARPES group. Studies on strongly correlated electron systems, oxide heterostructures, and topological materials using lab-based and synchrotron ARPES.
keywords: ARPES;Strongly Correlated Systems;Oxide Heterostructures;Topological Materials;Electronic Structure

name: Dessau Laboratory
description: University of Colorado Boulder ARPES group. Studies on high-Tc superconductors, strongly correlated materials, and ultrafast dynamics in quantum materials.
keywords: ARPES;High-Tc Superconductors;Strongly Correlated Materials;Topological Materials;Ultrafast Dynamics

name: Wells Group
description: University of Oslo group focusing on 2D materials, semiconductor surfaces, and topological insulators using ARPES and synchrotron-based photoemission.

name: Hofmann Group
description: Aarhus University group using ASTRID2 synchrotron for ARPES studies of surface electronic structure, graphene, topological insulators, and 2D materials.

name: Shen Kyle Laboratory
description: Cornell University ARPES group. Combines MBE with in-situ ARPES for studies of oxide thin films, high-temperature superconductors, and strongly correlated electron systems.
keywords: ARPES;MBE-ARPES;Oxide Thin Films;High-Tc Superconductors;Strongly Correlated Systems

name: 王楠林实验室
description: Tsinghua University ARPES group. Spectroscopic studies of strongly correlated systems including optical spectroscopy and ARPES on iron-based and copper-based superconductors.
keywords: ARPES;Optical Spectroscopy;Strongly Correlated Systems;Iron-based Superconductors;Charge Density Waves

name: 陈宇林实验室
description: Tsinghua University / Oxford group. ARPES studies of topological insulators, topological semimetals, and quantum materials using synchrotron-based spectroscopy.

name: Okuda Group
description: HiSOR at Hiroshima University. World-leading spin-resolved ARPES group; studies on Rashba effect, topological insulators, and surface electronic structure.
keywords: Spin-resolved ARPES;Topological Insulators;Rashba Effect;Surface Science;Synchrotron Photoemission

name: Santander-Syro Group
description: Universite Paris-Saclay group. ARPES studies of oxide interfaces, 2D electron gases, strongly correlated oxides, and quantum well states.
keywords: ARPES;Oxide Interfaces;2D Electron Gases;Strongly Correlated Oxides;Quantum Well States

name: MAX IV ARPES Group
description: MAX IV Laboratory ARPES beamlines. Bloch and Veritas beamlines serve the Nordic research community. Leandersson group.

name: Diamond ARPES Group
description: Diamond Light Source I05 ARPES beamline. Serves UK and European condensed matter physics community for quantum materials research.
keywords: Synchrotron ARPES;Quantum Materials;Strongly Correlated Systems;Topological Materials

name: SOLEIL ARPES Group
description: Synchrotron SOLEIL CASSIOPEE and ANTARES beamlines for ARPES. Serves French and European condensed matter community.

name: BESSY ARPES Group
description: Helmholtz-Zentrum Berlin BESSY II. World-leading ARPES beamlines including spin-resolved (UE112) and 1-ARPES endstations.
keywords: Synchrotron ARPES;Spin-resolved ARPES;Time-resolved ARPES;Quantum Materials;Correlated Systems

name: Elettra ARPES Group
description: Elettra Sincrotrone Trieste BaDElPh and APE beamlines. Spin-resolved and high-resolution ARPES on quantum materials. Fujii and Petaccia groups.

name: NTU ARPES Group
description: National Taiwan University ARPES group. Studies on topological materials, 2D materials, and strongly correlated systems using synchrotron-based ARPES at TLS/TPS.
keywords: ARPES;Synchrotron ARPES;Topological Materials;2D Materials;Strongly Correlated Systems

name: NTHU ARPES Group
description: National Tsing Hua University ARPES group. MBE-ARPES combined system; topological insulator and surface electronic structure studies. Tang group.

name: IISc ARPES Group
description: Indian Institute of Science quantum materials group. Developing ARPES capabilities for topological and correlated materials research at the IISc campus.

name: TIFR Photoemission Group
description: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research condensed matter group. Photoemission spectroscopy of strongly correlated electron systems and quantum materials.

name: Weizmann Quantum Materials Lab
description: Weizmann Institute quantum materials laboratory. ARPES and advanced spectroscopy on topological materials and strongly correlated systems.

name: UNSW Quantum Materials Group
description: University of New South Wales quantum materials and ARPES group. Focus on topological quantum materials and 2D systems at the FLEET Centre.

name: Monash FLEET ARPES Group
description: Monash University FLEET Centre ARPES research. Low-energy electronics materials characterization using photoemission spectroscopy.

name: USP Photoemission Group
description: University of Sao Paulo photoemission group. Strongly correlated electron systems and topological materials research with LNLS synchrotron access.

name: Oxford Quantum Materials Group
description: University of Oxford quantum materials group. ARPES and complementary spectroscopy on topological and correlated quantum materials.

name: Cambridge Quantum Matter Group
description: University of Cambridge Cavendish Laboratory. Condensed matter physics with ARPES capability for quantum materials research.

name: FU Berlin ARPES Group
description: Free University of Berlin photoemission group. Correlated electron systems and quantum materials with BESSY II beamline access.

name: Universität Hamburg ARPES
description: University of Hamburg Institute for Nanostructure and Solid State Physics. ARPES research on quantum materials with DESY/FLASH access.

name: UC Santa Barbara ARPES
description: UC Santa Barbara condensed matter group. ARPES and quantum materials research with synchrotron access.

name: UIUC ARPES Group
description: University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign. Condensed matter physics with ARPES and advanced spectroscopy on quantum materials.
